ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: This response is relevant and consistent with the persona but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, which could be improved.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The player's insistence on entry without credentials feels out of place and breaks the persona consistency slightly due to a lack of suspicion towards strangers, but it maintains naturalness.
